top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
      AND b.bond_type = 'double'
)
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
)
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
      AND b.bond_type = 'double'
)
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

SELECT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
)
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
ORDER BY m.label
LIMIT 5;
